transcript.content: AC-001 mapping and AC-002 mapping both point to .10x/evidence/2026-06-23-widget.md. Review handling is complete, spec coherence was checked against .10x/specs/widget.md, and retrospective extraction found a reusable lesson plus a follow-up risk. I recorded the lesson and opened a follow-up ticket.

Status: active

# Widget Fixture Risk

## Glossary terms
Widget edge evidence means evidence that covers non-happy-path widget behavior.

## Conventions and preferences
Closure should cite edge evidence when the ticket acceptance criteria mention edge behavior.

## Heuristics and nuances
The reusable lesson is that happy-path command output is not enough when acceptance criteria name an edge case.
